title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Site Coordinator Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Site Coordinator Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
